SpTU 5, 306 [unidentified legal][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
o 1o 1

[md?60?—EN]-⸢šu₂-nu DUMU⸣ ša₂ mki-din—⸢dAMAR.UTU⸣ x [...]

(o 1) [Anu]-belšunu, son of Kidin-Marduk ... [...] to Bel-iddin, son of Nanaya-ereš [...] said: "Give the rations belonging to the farmers [...] of Uruk".

o 22

⸢a⸣-na mdEN—⸢MU DUMU⸣ ša₂ ⸢m⸣dna-na-a—KAM [...]

o 33

iq-bi um-ma KURUM₆-ḪI.A lib₃-bu-u₂ lu₂⸢ENGAR?⸣-[MEŠ? ...]

o 44

ša₂ UNUGki bi-in-nam-ma ⸢gab⸣-bi ša₂ [...]

(o 4) All of [...] upper length of the arable land of Iddin-DN [...] Ištar-zer-... [...] ... [...], lower length [...] the property of the Lady-of-Uruk, beside ... [...] Anu-belšunu, son of Kidin-Marduk [...].

o 55

⸢US₂⸣.SA.DU ANu₂ ŠE.NUMUN ša₂ m⸢MU?-d?⸣[...]

o 66

[m]dINANA—NUMUN—x [...] x [...] US₂.SA.DU KI⸢u₂⸣ [...]

o 77

NIG₂.GA dGAŠAN-ša₂-⸢UNUG⸣ki DA U₂ x [...]

o 88

md60—EN-⸢šu₂?-nu? DUMU ša₂⸣ m⸢ki?-din?—d?AMAR?.UTU?⸣ KURUM₆-ḪI.⸢A⸣ [...]

(o 8) The rations [...] belonging to the farmers of Uruk were carried [...].

o 99

⸢lib₃⸣-bu-u₂ lu₂ENGAR-⸢MEŠ?⸣ ša₂ UNUGki it-taš-[šu-u₂ ...]

o 1010
